docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HEITZMAN, ROGER AS TO DEFENDANT MOSTOFIZADEH, CLAUDIA DBA BAY ARTS MOSTOFIZADEH, JAVAD DBA BAY ARTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEITZMAN, ROGER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSTOFIZADEH, CLAUDIA DBA BAY ARTS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,019.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
